text.title: Strategy Memo Template Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed across deployments. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: 8-page strategy memo; nobody reads past page 2.
antipattern.root-cause: Author did not cut to 2-page cap.
antipattern.fix: Hard 2-page (≤1200 words) cap; split into appendix if needed.

antipattern.symptom: Quarter mid-way, scope creep on three new markets; team overstretched.
antipattern.root-cause: Non-Bets section missing; nothing said 'not now'.
antipattern.fix: Require Non-Bets section with ≥5 explicit non-pursuits.

antipattern.symptom: Memo says 'be best in category'; cannot be re-evaluated.
antipattern.root-cause: Bets framed as aspirations, not falsifiable signals.
antipattern.fix: Every bet records signal + threshold + window.

antipattern.symptom: End of year, 'we improved retention'; no number to compare against.
antipattern.fix: Every success metric carries baseline + target + owner + review date.
